label: Maneuver
description: Associates a tool capacity with a verb and combat log rules, defining how a melee attack plays out at runtime.

requiredCapacity.label: Required capacity
requiredCapacity.description: ToolCapacityDef that a tool must have for this maneuver to be available.

verb.label: Verb
verb.description: Verb properties defining the attack mechanics for this maneuver.

combatLogRulesHit.label: Combat log rules hit
combatLogRulesHit.description: RulePackDef used to generate combat log text when this maneuver lands a hit.

combatLogRulesDeflect.label: Combat log rules deflect
combatLogRulesDeflect.description: RulePackDef used to generate combat log text when this maneuver is deflected by armor.

combatLogRulesMiss.label: Combat log rules miss
combatLogRulesMiss.description: RulePackDef used to generate combat log text when this maneuver misses.

combatLogRulesDodge.label: Combat log rules dodge
combatLogRulesDodge.description: RulePackDef used to generate combat log text when this maneuver is dodged.

logEntryDef.label: Log entry def
logEntryDef.description: LogEntryDef that determines which battle log entry type is created when this maneuver executes.

basic-maneuver.label: Basic maneuver
basic-maneuver.description: Minimal maneuver with required capacity and verb.
